sub_modules.nr_poly_eval: Combinational fixed-point cubic polynomial evaluator using Horner's method.
sub_modules.nr_derivative_eval: Combinational fixed-point derivative evaluator for a cubic polynomial.
sub_modules.nr_fixed_div: Combinational extended-width fixed-point divider used to compute the Newton correction term.
sub_modules.nr_newton_update: Combinational Newton-Raphson state update block with derivative-zero hold behavior.
sub_modules.nr_root_verify: Combinational verification block that checks whether the polynomial value is within tolerance.
